test_cases.name: health_check_returns_ok
test_cases.description: Verify health endpoint returns status ok

test_cases.name: create_author_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Create author with name, bio, and born_year

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name
test_cases.description: Reject author creation without required name field

test_cases.name: create_author_born_year_out_of_range
test_cases.description: Reject author with born_year greater than 2026

test_cases.name: get_author_returns_etag_header
test_cases.description: Verify GET author returns ETag header for caching

test_cases.name: get_author_with_if_none_match_etag
test_cases.description: Return 304 Not Modified when ETag matches via If-None-Match header

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Return 404 for non-existent author ID

test_cases.name: update_author_with_if_match_success
test_cases.description: Update author when If-Match ETag is current

test_cases.name: update_author_with_stale_etag
test_cases.description: Reject update with If-Match header when ETag is stale

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_associated_books
test_cases.description: Prevent deletion of author with non-deleted books

test_cases.name: create_category_unique_name
test_cases.description: Create category with unique name

test_cases.name: create_category_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Reject category creation with duplicate name

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_isbn
test_cases.description: Create book with ISBN between 10-13 characters

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Reject book creation with duplicate ISBN

test_cases.name: create_book_isbn_too_short
test_cases.description: Reject book with ISBN shorter than 10 characters

test_cases.name: create_book_negative_price
test_cases.description: Reject book with negative price

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Return 410 Gone for soft-deleted book

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book_sets_is_deleted
test_cases.description: Soft delete book without physical removal

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore a soft-deleted book

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Reject restore attempt on non-deleted book

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book
test_cases.description: Apply discount to book published more than 1 year ago

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Reject discount on book published within last year

test_cases.name: discount_rate_limit_exceeded
test_cases.description: Return 429 when discount endpoint rate limit (5 per 10s) exceeded

test_cases.name: increase_stock_quantity
test_cases.description: Increase book stock with positive quantity delta

test_cases.name: decrease_stock_below_zero
test_cases.description: Reject stock decrease that would result in negative quantity

test_cases.name: upload_cover_valid_jpeg
test_cases.description: Upload JPEG cover image successfully

test_cases.name: upload_cover_unsupported_type
test_cases.description: Reject cover upload with unsupported file type

test_cases.name: upload_cover_exceeds_size_limit
test_cases.description: Reject cover image larger than 2 MB

test_cases.name: create_review_valid_rating
test_cases.description: Create review with rating between 1-5
